text:
Created attachment 238167
Corrected patch to update net/rabbitmq to 3.9.25

Corrected patch to update net/rabbitmq to version 3.9.25

Bumped lang/elixir dependency to at least 1.13.4 due to
https://github.com/rabbitmq/rabbitmq-server/blob/v3.9.25/deps/rabbitmq_cli/mix.exs

No other changes from the previous patch.
